_comment: Section heading patterns that mark the end of the header zone. Multilingual: Czech, English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Slovak, Polish. All patterns require a trailing numeral or roman numeral to avoid false-positives on body text. Each entry specifies its own regex flags; keyword-based patterns use 'iu' for case-insensitive Unicode matching, while the roman-numeral pattern stays case-sensitive to avoid matching lowercase list markers (i., ii.).
